'''Sandi Maba''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] mother of two left stranded on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] left the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] settled her and her family on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], and she planned to stay on the world permanently.

==Appearances==
